let _where = { lambda ; a:bool[] b:f32[] c:f32[]. let
    d:f32[] = select_n a c b
  in (d,) } in
{ lambda ; e:f32[2,2] f:f32[2]. let
    _:f32[2,2] = transpose[permutation=(1, 0)] e
    g:f32[2,2] = transpose[permutation=(1, 0)] e
    _:bool[] = jit[
      name=allclose
      jaxpr={ lambda ; e:f32[2,2] g:f32[2,2] h:f32[] i:f32[]. let
          j:bool[2,2] = jit[
            name=isclose
            jaxpr={ lambda ; e:f32[2,2] g:f32[2,2] i:f32[] h:f32[]. let
                k:f32[] = convert_element_type[
                  new_dtype=float32
                  weak_type=False
                ] i
                l:f32[] = convert_element_type[
                  new_dtype=float32
                  weak_type=False
                ] h
                m:bool[2,2] = ne e e
                n:bool[2,2] = ne g g
                _:bool[2,2] = and m n
                o:bool[2,2] = is_finite g
                p:f32[2,2] = sub e g
                q:f32[2,2] = abs p
                r:f32[2,2] = abs g
                s:f32[2,2] = mul k r
                t:f32[2,2] = add l s
                u:bool[2,2] = le q t
                v:bool[2,2] = eq e g
                w:bool[2,2] = and o u
                j:bool[2,2] = or v w
              in (j,) }
          ] e g i h
          _:bool[] = reduce_and[axes=(0, 1)] j
        in (_,) }
    ] e g 1e-08:f32[] 1e-05:f32[]
    x:i32[3] = iota[dimension=0 dtype=int32 shape=(3,) sharding=None] 
    y:f32[4,2] = broadcast_in_dim 0.0:f32[]
    z:f32[3] = broadcast_in_dim 0.0:f32[]
    ba:f32[4] = broadcast_in_dim 0.0:f32[]
    bb:f32[] = dot_general[
      dimension_numbers=(([0], [0]), ([], []))
      preferred_element_type=float32
    ] f f
    bc:f32[] = sqrt bb
    bd:f32[2] = broadcast_in_dim 0.0:f32[]
    be:i32[1] = broadcast_in_dim 0:i32[]
    bf:f32[2] = scatter[
      dimension_numbers=ScatterDimensionNumbers(update_window_dims=(), inserted_window_dims=(0,), scatter_dims_to_operand_dims=(0,), operand_batching_dims=(), scatter_indices_batching_dims=())
      indices_are_sorted=True
      mode=GatherScatterMode.FILL_OR_DROP
      unique_indices=True
      update_consts=()
      update_jaxpr=None
    ] bd be 1.0:f32[]
    bg:f32[] = dot_general[
      dimension_numbers=(([0], [0]), ([], []))
      preferred_element_type=float32
    ] bf bf
    bh:f32[] = sqrt bg
    bi:bool[] = gt bh 0.0:f32[]
    bj:f32[] = jit[name=_where jaxpr=_where] bi bh 1.0:f32[]
    bk:f32[] = div 1.0:f32[] bj
    bl:f32[] = jit[name=_where jaxpr=_where] bi bk 0.0:f32[]
    bm:f32[2] = mul bl bf
    bn:bool[] = gt bc 9.999999960041972e-13:f32[]
    bo:i32[] = convert_element_type[new_dtype=int32 weak_type=False] bn
    bp:f32[2] = cond[
      branches=(
        { lambda ; bq:f32[] br:f32[2] bs:f32[2] bt:f32[]. let  in (bs,) }
        { lambda ; bu:f32[] bv:f32[2] bw:f32[2] bx:f32[]. let
            by:bool[] = gt bu 0.0:f32[]
            bz:f32[] = jit[name=_where jaxpr=_where] by bu 1.0:f32[]
            ca:f32[] = div 1.0:f32[] bz
            cb:f32[] = jit[name=_where jaxpr=_where] by ca 0.0:f32[]
            cc:f32[2] = mul cb bv
          in (cc,) }
      )
    ] bo bc f bm 0.0:f32[]
    cd:i32[1] = broadcast_in_dim 0:i32[]
    ce:f32[4,2] = scatter[
      dimension_numbers=ScatterDimensionNumbers(update_window_dims=(0,), inserted_window_dims=(0,), scatter_dims_to_operand_dims=(0,), operand_batching_dims=(), scatter_indices_batching_dims=())
      indices_are_sorted=True
      mode=GatherScatterMode.FILL_OR_DROP
      unique_indices=True
      update_consts=()
      update_jaxpr=None
    ] y cd bp
    cf:i32[4] = iota[dimension=0 dtype=int32 shape=(4,) sharding=None] 
    _:f32[4] = broadcast_in_dim 0.0:f32[]
    cg:i32[] ch:f32[4,2] ci:f32[3] cj:f32[4] _:f32[] ck:i32[] _:bool[] = while[
      body_jaxpr={ lambda ; cl:f32[2,2] cm:i32[4] cn:f32[] co:i32[] cp:f32[4,2] cq:f32[3]
          cr:f32[4] cs:f32[] ct:i32[] cu:bool[]. let
          cv:i32[] = convert_element_type[new_dtype=int32 weak_type=False] co
          cw:bool[] = lt cv 0:i32[]
          cx:i32[] = add cv 4:i32[]
          cy:i32[] = select_n cw cv cx
          cz:bool[] = lt 0:i32[] 0:i32[]
          da:i32[] = add 0:i32[] 2:i32[]
          db:i32[] = select_n cz 0:i32[] da
          dc:f32[1,2] = dynamic_slice[slice_sizes=(1, 2)] cp cy db
          dd:f32[2] = squeeze[dimensions=(0,)] dc
          de:f32[2] = dot_general[
            dimension_numbers=(([1], [0]), ([], []))
            preferred_element_type=float32
          ] cl dd
          df:f32[] = dot_general[
            dimension_numbers=(([0], [0]), ([], []))
            preferred_element_type=float32
          ] dd de
          dg:bool[] = lt co 0:i32[]
          dh:i32[] = add co 3:i32[]
          di:i32[] = select_n dg co dh
          dj:i32[] = convert_element_type[new_dtype=int32 weak_type=False] di
          dk:i32[1] = broadcast_in_dim dj
          dl:f32[3] = scatter[
            dimension_numbers=ScatterDimensionNumbers(update_window_dims=(), inserted_window_dims=(0,), scatter_dims_to_operand_dims=(0,), operand_batching_dims=(), scatter_indices_batching_dims=())
            indices_are_sorted=True
            mode=GatherScatterMode.FILL_OR_DROP
            unique_indices=True
            update_consts=()
            update_jaxpr=None
          ] cq dk df
          dm:bool[] = eq co 0:i32[]
          dn:i32[] = convert_element_type[new_dtype=int32 weak_type=False] dm
          do:f32[2] = cond[
            branches=(
              { lambda ; dp:f32[] dq:f32[2] dr:i32[] ds:f32[4] dt:f32[4,2] du:f32[2]. let
                  dv:f32[2] = mul dp dq
                  dw:f32[2] = sub du dv
                  dx:bool[] = lt dr 0:i32[]
                  dy:i32[] = convert_element_type[
                    new_dtype=int32
                    weak_type=False
                  ] dr
                  dz:i32[] = add dy 4:i32[]
                  ea:i32[] = select_n dx dr dz
                  eb:f32[1] = dynamic_slice[slice_sizes=(1,)] ds ea
                  ec:f32[] = squeeze[dimensions=(0,)] eb
                  ed:i32[] = sub dr 1:i32[]
                  ee:i32[] = convert_element_type[
                    new_dtype=int32
                    weak_type=False
                  ] ed
                  ef:bool[] = lt ee 0:i32[]
                  eg:i32[] = add ee 4:i32[]
                  eh:i32[] = select_n ef ee eg
                  ei:bool[] = lt 0:i32[] 0:i32[]
                  ej:i32[] = add 0:i32[] 2:i32[]
                  ek:i32[] = select_n ei 0:i32[] ej
                  el:f32[1,2] = dynamic_slice[slice_sizes=(1, 2)] dt eh ek
                  em:f32[2] = squeeze[dimensions=(0,)] el
                  en:f32[2] = mul ec em
                  eo:f32[2] = sub dw en
                in (eo,) }
              { lambda ; ep:f32[] eq:f32[2] er:i32[] es:f32[4] et:f32[4,2] eu:f32[2]. let
                  ev:f32[2] = mul ep eq
                  ew:f32[2] = sub eu ev
                in (ew,) }
            )
          ] dn df dd co cr cp de
          ex:i32[] = add co 1:i32[]
          ey:i32[] = convert_element_type[new_dtype=int32 weak_type=False] ex
          ez:bool[4] = lt cm ey
          fa:f32[4] = jit[
            name=_where
            jaxpr={ lambda ; ez:bool[4] fb:f32[] fc:f32[]. let
                fd:f32[4] = broadcast_in_dim fb
                fe:f32[4] = broadcast_in_dim fc
                fa:f32[4] = select_n ez fe fd
              in (fa,) }
          ] ez 1.0:f32[] 0.0:f32[]
          ff:f32[4] = dot_general[
            dimension_numbers=(([1], [0]), ([], []))
            preferred_element_type=float32
          ] cp do
          fg:f32[4] = mul ff fa
          fh:f32[4,1] = broadcast_in_dim[broadcast_dimensions=(0,)] fg
          fi:f32[4,2] = mul fh cp
          fj:f32[2] = reduce_sum[axes=(0,) out_sharding=None] fi
          fk:f32[2] = sub do fj
          fl:f32[] = dot_general[
            dimension_numbers=(([0], [0]), ([], []))
            preferred_element_type=float32
          ] fk fk
          fm:f32[] = sqrt fl
          fn:i32[] = add co 1:i32[]
          fo:bool[] = lt fn 0:i32[]
          fp:i32[] = add fn 4:i32[]
          fq:i32[] = select_n fo fn fp
          fr:i32[] = convert_element_type[new_dtype=int32 weak_type=False] fq
          fs:i32[1] = broadcast_in_dim fr
          ft:f32[4] = scatter[
            dimension_numbers=ScatterDimensionNumbers(update_window_dims=(), inserted_window_dims=(0,), scatter_dims_to_operand_dims=(0,), operand_batching_dims=(), scatter_indices_batching_dims=())
            indices_are_sorted=True
            mode=GatherScatterMode.FILL_OR_DROP
            unique_indices=True
            update_consts=()
            update_jaxpr=None
          ] cr fs fm
          fu:bool[] = lt fm cn
          fv:bool[] = eq ct 3:i32[]
          fw:bool[] = convert_element_type[new_dtype=bool weak_type=False] fv
          fx:bool[] = and fu fw
          fy:i32[] = add co 1:i32[]
          fz:i32[] = jit[
            name=_where
            jaxpr={ lambda ; fx:bool[] fy:i32[] ct:i32[]. let
                fz:i32[] = select_n fx ct fy
              in (fz,) }
          ] fx fy ct
          ga:bool[] = ge fm cn
          gb:i32[] = convert_element_type[new_dtype=int32 weak_type=False] ga
          gc:f32[4,2] = cond[
            branches=(
              { lambda ; gd:f32[] ge:f32[2] gf:i32[] gg:f32[4,2]. let
                  
                in (gg,) }
              { lambda ; gh:f32[] gi:f32[2] gj:i32[] gk:f32[4,2]. let
                  gl:bool[] = gt gh 0.0:f32[]
                  gm:f32[] = jit[name=_where jaxpr=_where] gl gh 1.0:f32[]
                  gn:f32[] = div 1.0:f32[] gm
                  go:f32[] = jit[name=_where jaxpr=_where] gl gn 0.0:f32[]
                  gp:f32[2] = mul go gi
                  gq:i32[] = add gj 1:i32[]
                  gr:bool[] = lt gq 0:i32[]
                  gs:i32[] = add gq 4:i32[]
                  gt:i32[] = select_n gr gq gs
                  gu:i32[] = convert_element_type[
                    new_dtype=int32
                    weak_type=False
                  ] gt
                  gv:i32[1] = broadcast_in_dim gu
                  gw:f32[4,2] = scatter[
                    dimension_numbers=ScatterDimensionNumbers(update_window_dims=(0,), inserted_window_dims=(0,), scatter_dims_to_operand_dims=(0,), operand_batching_dims=(), scatter_indices_batching_dims=())
                    indices_are_sorted=True
                    mode=GatherScatterMode.FILL_OR_DROP
                    unique_indices=True
                    update_consts=()
                    update_jaxpr=None
                  ] gk gv gp
                in (gw,) }
            )
          ] gb fm fk co cp
          gx:i32[] = add co 1:i32[]
          gy:bool[] = ge gx 3:i32[]
          gz:i32[] = jit[
            name=remainder
            jaxpr={ lambda ; gx:i32[] ha:i32[]. let
                hb:bool[] = eq ha 0:i32[]
                hc:i32[] = jit[
                  name=_where
                  jaxpr={ lambda ; hb:bool[] hd:i32[] ha:i32[]. let
                      hc:i32[] = select_n hb ha hd
                    in (hc,) }
                ] hb 1:i32[] ha
                he:i32[] = rem gx hc
                hf:bool[] = ne he 0:i32[]
                hg:bool[] = lt he 0:i32[]
                hh:bool[] = lt hc 0:i32[]
                hi:bool[] = ne hg hh
                hj:bool[] = and hi hf
                hk:i32[] = add he hc
                gz:i32[] = select_n hj he hk
              in (gz,) }
          ] gx 1:i32[]
          hl:bool[] = eq gz 0:i32[]
          hm:bool[] = convert_element_type[new_dtype=bool weak_type=False] gy
          hn:bool[] = convert_element_type[new_dtype=bool weak_type=False] hl
          ho:bool[] = or hm hn
          hp:i32[] = convert_element_type[new_dtype=int32 weak_type=False] ho
          hq:bool[] = cond[
            branches=(
              { lambda ; hr:f32[] hs:f32[] ht:bool[] hu:f32[]. let  in (ht,) }
              { lambda ; hv:f32[] hw:f32[] hx:bool[] hy:f32[]. let
                  hz:bool[] = ge hv hw
                in (hz,) }
            )
          ] hp fm cn cu 0.0:f32[]
        in (gx, gc, dl, ft, fm, fz, hq) }
      body_nconsts=3
      cond_jaxpr={ lambda ; ia:i32[] ib:f32[4,2] ic:f32[3] id:f32[4] ie:f32[] if:i32[]
          ig:bool[]. let
          ih:bool[] = lt ia 3:i32[]
          ii:bool[] = convert_element_type[new_dtype=bool weak_type=False] ih
          ij:bool[] = and ii ig
        in (ij,) }
      cond_nconsts=0
    ] e cf 9.999999974752427e-07:f32[] 0:i32[] ce z ba 1.0:f32[] 3:i32[] True:bool[]
    ik:i32[] = min ck cg
    il:i32[3] = iota[dimension=0 dtype=int32 shape=(3,) sharding=None] 
    im:i32[4] = iota[dimension=0 dtype=int32 shape=(4,) sharding=None] 
    in:i32[] = convert_element_type[new_dtype=int32 weak_type=False] ik
    io:bool[3] = lt il in
    ip:f32[3] = abs ci
    iq:f32[] = reduce_max[axes=(0,)] ip
    ir:f32[4] = abs cj
    is:f32[] = reduce_max[axes=(0,)] ir
    it:f32[] = mul 2.0:f32[] is
    iu:f32[] = add iq it
    iv:f32[] = add iu 1.0:f32[]
    iw:f32[3] = jit[
      name=_where
      jaxpr={ lambda ; io:bool[3] ci:f32[3] iv:f32[]. let
          ix:f32[3] = broadcast_in_dim iv
          iw:f32[3] = select_n io ix ci
        in (iw,) }
    ] io ci iv
    iy:i32[] = convert_element_type[new_dtype=int32 weak_type=False] ik
    iz:bool[4] = eq im iy
    ja:f32[4] = jit[
      name=_where
      jaxpr={ lambda ; iz:bool[4] jb:f32[] cj:f32[4]. let
          jc:f32[4] = broadcast_in_dim jb
          ja:f32[4] = select_n iz cj jc
        in (ja,) }
    ] iz 0.0:f32[] cj
    jd:f32[3,3] = broadcast_in_dim 0.0:f32[]
    _:i32[] je:f32[3,3] = scan[
      _split_transpose=False
      jaxpr={ lambda ; jf:f32[3] jg:i32[] jh:f32[3,3]. let
          ji:i32[] = add jg 1:i32[]
          jj:bool[] = lt jg 0:i32[]
          jk:i32[] = convert_element_type[new_dtype=int32 weak_type=False] jg
          jl:i32[] = add jk 3:i32[]
          jm:i32[] = select_n jj jg jl
          jn:f32[1] = dynamic_slice[slice_sizes=(1,)] jf jm
          jo:f32[] = squeeze[dimensions=(0,)] jn
          jp:bool[] = lt jg 0:i32[]
          jq:i32[] = add jg 3:i32[]
          jr:i32[] = select_n jp jg jq
          js:bool[] = lt jg 0:i32[]
          jt:i32[] = add jg 3:i32[]
          ju:i32[] = select_n js jg jt
          jv:i32[] = convert_element_type[new_dtype=int32 weak_type=False] jr
          jw:i32[] = convert_element_type[new_dtype=int32 weak_type=False] ju
          jx:i32[1] = broadcast_in_dim jv
          jy:i32[1] = broadcast_in_dim jw
          jz:i32[2] = concatenate[dimension=0] jx jy
          ka:f32[3,3] = scatter[
            dimension_numbers=ScatterDimensionNumbers(update_window_dims=(), inserted_window_dims=(0, 1), scatter_dims_to_operand_dims=(0, 1), operand_batching_dims=(), scatter_indices_batching_dims=())
            indices_are_sorted=True
            mode=GatherScatterMode.FILL_OR_DROP
            unique_indices=True
            update_consts=()
            update_jaxpr=None
          ] jh jz jo
        in (ji, ka) }
      length=3
      linear=(False, False, False)
      num_carry=2
      num_consts=1
      reverse=False
      unroll=1
    ] iw 0:i32[] jd
    _:i32[] kb:f32[3,3] = scan[
      _split_transpose=False
      jaxpr={ lambda ; kc:f32[4] kd:i32[] ke:f32[3,3]. let
          kf:i32[] = add kd 1:i32[]
          kg:i32[] = add kd 1:i32[]
          kh:bool[] = lt kg 0:i32[]
          ki:i32[] = convert_element_type[new_dtype=int32 weak_type=False] kg
          kj:i32[] = add ki 4:i32[]
          kk:i32[] = select_n kh kg kj
          kl:f32[1] = dynamic_slice[slice_sizes=(1,)] kc kk
          km:f32[] = squeeze[dimensions=(0,)] kl
          kn:i32[] = add kd 1:i32[]
          ko:bool[] = lt kd 0:i32[]
          kp:i32[] = add kd 3:i32[]
          kq:i32[] = select_n ko kd kp
          kr:bool[] = lt kn 0:i32[]
          ks:i32[] = add kn 3:i32[]
          kt:i32[] = select_n kr kn ks
          ku:i32[] = convert_element_type[new_dtype=int32 weak_type=False] kq
          kv:i32[] = convert_element_type[new_dtype=int32 weak_type=False] kt
          kw:i32[1] = broadcast_in_dim ku
          kx:i32[1] = broadcast_in_dim kv
          ky:i32[2] = concatenate[dimension=0] kw kx
          kz:f32[3,3] = scatter[
            dimension_numbers=ScatterDimensionNumbers(update_window_dims=(), inserted_window_dims=(0, 1), scatter_dims_to_operand_dims=(0, 1), operand_batching_dims=(), scatter_indices_batching_dims=())
            indices_are_sorted=True
            mode=GatherScatterMode.FILL_OR_DROP
            unique_indices=True
            update_consts=()
            update_jaxpr=None
          ] ke ky km
          la:i32[] = add kd 1:i32[]
          lb:bool[] = lt la 0:i32[]
          lc:i32[] = add la 3:i32[]
          ld:i32[] = select_n lb la lc
          le:bool[] = lt kd 0:i32[]
          lf:i32[] = add kd 3:i32[]
          lg:i32[] = select_n le kd lf
          lh:i32[] = convert_element_type[new_dtype=int32 weak_type=False] ld
          li:i32[] = convert_element_type[new_dtype=int32 weak_type=False] lg
          lj:i32[1] = broadcast_in_dim lh
          lk:i32[1] = broadcast_in_dim li
          ll:i32[2] = concatenate[dimension=0] lj lk
          lm:f32[3,3] = scatter[
            dimension_numbers=ScatterDimensionNumbers(update_window_dims=(), inserted_window_dims=(0, 1), scatter_dims_to_operand_dims=(0, 1), operand_batching_dims=(), scatter_indices_batching_dims=())
            indices_are_sorted=True
            mode=GatherScatterMode.FILL_OR_DROP
            unique_indices=True
            update_consts=()
            update_jaxpr=None
          ] kz ll km
        in (kf, lm) }
      length=2
      linear=(False, False, False)
      num_carry=2
      num_consts=1
      reverse=False
      unroll=1
    ] ja 0:i32[] je
    _:f32[3] ln:f32[3,3] = jit[
      name=eigh
      jaxpr={ lambda ; kb:f32[3,3]. let
          lo:f32[3,3] = transpose[permutation=(1, 0)] kb
          lp:f32[3,3] = add kb lo
          lq:f32[3,3] = div lp 2.0:f32[]
          ln:f32[3,3] _:f32[3] = eigh[
            algorithm=None
            lower=True
            sort_eigenvalues=True
            subset_by_index=None
          ] lq
        in (_, ln) }
    ] kb
    lr:f32[3,1] = slice[limit_indices=(3, 1) start_indices=(0, 0) strides=None] ln
    ls:f32[3] = squeeze[dimensions=(1,)] lr
    lt:bool[] = lt ik 0:i32[]
    lu:i32[] = convert_element_type[new_dtype=int32 weak_type=False] ik
    lv:i32[] = add lu 4:i32[]
    lw:i32[] = select_n lt ik lv
    lx:f32[1] = dynamic_slice[slice_sizes=(1,)] cj lw
    ly:f32[] = squeeze[dimensions=(0,)] lx
    lz:i32[] = sub ik 1:i32[]
    ma:bool[] = lt lz 0:i32[]
    mb:i32[] = convert_element_type[new_dtype=int32 weak_type=False] lz
    mc:i32[] = add mb 3:i32[]
    md:i32[] = select_n ma lz mc
    me:f32[1] = dynamic_slice[slice_sizes=(1,)] ls md
    mf:f32[] = squeeze[dimensions=(0,)] me
    mg:f32[] = abs mf
    mh:f32[] = mul ly mg
    _:bool[] = lt mh 9.999999974752427e-07:f32[]
    mi:i32[] = convert_element_type[new_dtype=int32 weak_type=False] ik
    mj:bool[3] = lt x mi
    mk:f32[3] = jit[
      name=_where
      jaxpr={ lambda ; mj:bool[3] ml:f32[] mm:f32[]. let
          mn:f32[3] = broadcast_in_dim ml
          mo:f32[3] = broadcast_in_dim mm
          mk:f32[3] = select_n mj mo mn
        in (mk,) }
    ] mj 1.0:f32[] 0.0:f32[]
    mp:f32[3] = mul ls mk
    mq:f32[3,2] = slice[limit_indices=(3, 2) start_indices=(0, 0) strides=None] ch
    mr:f32[2] = dot_general[
      dimension_numbers=(([0], [0]), ([], []))
      preferred_element_type=float32
    ] mp mq
    ms:f32[] = dot_general[
      dimension_numbers=(([0], [0]), ([], []))
      preferred_element_type=float32
    ] mr mr
    mt:f32[] = sqrt ms
    mu:bool[] = gt mt 9.999999960041972e-13:f32[]
    mv:i32[] = convert_element_type[new_dtype=int32 weak_type=False] mu
    mw:f32[2] = cond[
      branches=(
        { lambda ; mx:f32[] my:f32[2] mz:f32[2] na:f32[]. let  in (mz,) }
        { lambda ; nb:f32[] nc:f32[2] nd:f32[2] ne:f32[]. let
            nf:bool[] = gt nb 0.0:f32[]
            ng:f32[] = jit[name=_where jaxpr=_where] nf nb 1.0:f32[]
            nh:f32[] = div 1.0:f32[] ng
            ni:f32[] = jit[name=_where jaxpr=_where] nf nh 0.0:f32[]
            nj:f32[2] = mul ni nc
          in (nj,) }
      )
    ] mv mt mr bm 0.0:f32[]
    nk:f32[2] = dot_general[
      dimension_numbers=(([1], [0]), ([], []))
      preferred_element_type=float32
    ] e mw
    nl:f32[] = dot_general[
      dimension_numbers=(([0], [0]), ([], []))
      preferred_element_type=float32
    ] mw nk
    nm:f32[] = dot_general[
      dimension_numbers=(([0], [0]), ([], []))
      preferred_element_type=float32
    ] mw mw
    nn:f32[] = div nl nm
  in (nn,) }
